summary: The dashcam footage shows a vehicle traveling along a suburban street. A white sedan overtakes the dashcam vehicle from behind, passing closely. Concurrently, a bus travels alongside the dashcam vehicle, maintaining a safe distance.

events_timeline.event: A white sedan overtakes the dashcam vehicle from behind, passing closely.
A bus travels alongside the dashcam vehicle, maintaining a safe distance.

uncertainties: Exact speed and distance between vehicles cannot be determined.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or hazardous situation.
